payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.noCompany: Select an active company to manage payroll.

banner.body: Clarito currently produces the current model (≤ June 2026); for July 2026+ the exported file still uses the old structure — validate it in DUKIntegrator before filing.

emp.emptyNone: No employees — add employees to calculate salaries.
emp.emptySearch: No employees match the current search.
emp.footnoteBold: pupil/student under 26, apprentice under 18, persons with disabilities, pensioners, multiple contracts adding up to ≥ full time

stat.title: Payroll register — {{period}}
stat.emptyPrompt: Press “Run payroll” to calculate the month's contributions and post the journal entry.
stat.noActive: No active employees — nothing to calculate.
stat.footnote: * CAS and CASS are calculated on the minimum gross salary base for part-time contracts without an exception — the difference is borne by the employer under art. 146(5⁶) of the Fiscal Code.
stat.postedNote: The aggregated journal entry (641/421, 4315, 4316, 444, 646/436) was posted to the journal on

cm.title: Medical leaves — {{period}}
cm.footnote1: FNUASS indemnities are recovered through the
cm.footnote2: filed with CAS after D112 · code 01: first 5 days paid by the employer, the rest from FNUASS · source of the D112 asiguratD block
cm.cod01Note: code 01: first 5 days paid by the employer, the rest from FNUASS

sedii.title: Fiscally registered secondary offices
sedii.footnote2: must register fiscally (own CIF) and declare salary tax separately in D112 — section F.

empModal.subtitle: This data feeds the payroll register and D112
empModal.contractEndDateHint: Optional. For part-time, the minimum CAS/CASS base is prorated over worked days in months with a mid-month hire/termination.
empModal.excElevStudent: Pupil / student up to 26 years old (lit. a)
empModal.excUcenic: Apprentice up to 18 years old (lit. b)
empModal.beneficiar200Hint: Art. III OUG 89/2025: full-time employee, base salary = minimum wage, not cut during 2026. 300 lei (Jan–Jun) / 200 lei (Jul–Dec) free of income tax + CAS/CASS/CAM. Tick only if all conditions are met.
empModal.codCorHint: Romanian Occupational Classification code — required on the REGES-Online portal.

reges.exportError: Could not export the REGES register.
reges.portalNote: REGES-Online (HG 295/2025) is an online portal operated by the Labour Inspectorate — filing is done at registrul.inspectmun.ro. This CSV is the register dataset for reference / manual upload.

cmModal.title: Add medical leave certificate
cmModal.subtitle: {{month}} · OUG 158/2005 — source of the D112 asiguratD block

sediuModal.title: Add secondary office
sediuModal.subtitle: Own CIF (digits only, unique per company) — D112 angajatorF2 / section F
sediuModal.name: Name (optional)

d112.subNew: the new OPANAF 605/2026 model applies — the export still uses the old structure (validate in DUKIntegrator)
d112.subOld: current model; the new OPANAF 605/2026 model applies from the July 2026 reporting month
d112.foot: Includes section F (secondary offices) and asiguratD (medical leaves)
d112.previewFailed: Could not generate the XML preview.
d112.rectificativeHint: Files a correction of an already-submitted declaration for the same period (d_rec=1); it contains the full recomputed dataset.

notify.runError: Could not run the payroll register.
notify.deleteSediuError: Could not delete the secondary office.
notify.deleteConcediuError: Could not delete the medical leave.
notify.addConcediuError: Could not add the medical leave.
notify.addSediuError: Could not add the secondary office.
notify.exportRegesError: Could not export the REGES employee register.
notify.newModelWarn: For {{month}} {{year}} the NEW D112 model (OPANAF 605/2026) applies, not yet implemented — the exported file uses the old structure (≤ June 2026) and may be rejected by DUKIntegrator. Check it before filing.
notify.exported: D112 (XML) exported — header + employer obligations + {{insured}}. Import it into the D112 application (smart PDF), validate it (DUKIntegrator) and fill in the declarant + special blocks before filing.

sim.title: Gross ↔ Net simulator
sim.subtitle: Quick calculation — 2026 rates: CAS 25% · CASS 10% · income tax 10% · CAM 2.25%
sim.labelBeneficiarHint: Full-time, minimum wage, not reduced in 2026 (art. III OUG 89/2025)
sim.calcHint: No employee, no payroll run. Uses the same engine as the real payroll.
sim.noteCarveout: Non-taxable sum 300 RON H1 / 200 RON H2 deducted from CAS/CASS/income tax base.
sim.noteNoCci: CCI 0.85% ABOLISHED (OUG 79/2017) — only employer cost: CAM 2.25%.

pontaj.title: Timesheet — {{period}}
pontaj.subtitle: Worked days per employee (Labour Code art. 119). Overrides the calendar basis when running the payroll register.
pontaj.footnote: * Worked days override the calendar basis when running the payroll register (only if the employee has no medical leave recorded). Absences and annual leave are informational.
